name: Crunchy Seafood Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned seafood and discard any bones from the crabmeat and devein the shrimp.
2. Place the drained seafood in a bowl and chill.
3. In a large bowl, combine the remaining ingredients except for the tomato. Toss well to mix.
4. Add the chilled seafood to the bowl and toss again.
5. Add your choice of dressing (such as mayo or sour cream) and toss once more.
6. Garnish with tomato wedges before serving.
